page.title: Copy Station Logistic Config
page.t: Copy Station Logistic: Source: %1. Right-click another player station and pick Apply.
Copy Station Logistic: copy source cleared.
Copy Station Logistic: Source no longer valid. Pick a new source.
Copy Station Logistic: Applying: all wares -> %1
Copy Station Logistic: Applying: %1 selected wares -> %2
Copy Station Logistic: Applying: %1 selected wares + drone config -> %2
Copy Station Logistic: No wares selected.
